title: Harder Budding Amethyst
description: Budding Amethyst will break a lot slower, which helps prevent accidentally mining.
body:
# Description
This Datapack makes Budding Amethyst break a lot slower by removing the block from the Block Tag list for blocks mineable by pickaxe. If you have a Haste 2 while using an Efficiency 5 Netherite Pickaxe, it still will take a between 5 and 6 seconds to break.

# Compatiblity
This pack replaces the `mineable/pickaxe` Block Tag with a copy that has Budding Amethyst removed. Unfortunately here's no way to remove it from the list without overwritting the entire list. If you have packs that add to this list, this pack needs to be loaded before those packs. This pack wont be compatible with other packs that also replace this list instead of adding to it.

# Optional Advancment Guides
To enable a list with guides for my datapacks, use `/advancement grant <targets> from dragon3025:root`.
